reviews.review_msg: His assignments are very time-consuming. It takes two to three days to complete it. And his curve will scare you to death. The grade cut off is 50 for a C- 74 for a C  82.5 for a C+ and 87 for a B-. The quizzes are easy tho but the assignments are not.
worst prof I've ever had in SFU! very hard exams! Inconsistent format for his practice exams, midterms, and final! It will surpirce you BADDDDDD!
